Title: Home Page: Export Assets function
Description:
The user should be able to export selected assets to Excel.


Selecting assets from the search result and clicking the Export button (name to be reviewed), the user can export a list of the selected assets and a few metadata to Excel

Title: Find duplicate assets
Description:
Based on vectorisation queries, find duplicate assets. 
Link them together - let's discuss how to do this exactly.
Reports on duplicate assets to be displayed in widget in Analytics tab.

Title: User Management: Ability for user to reset password
Description: Non-AD users should be able to reset their password from the settings menu.
